PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://whatsapp-bot-tasks-management.onrender.com/health/live" -TimeoutSec 30 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://7107.api.greenapi.com/waInstance710722680672/getStatusInstance/bc21ddad58544c1abd540be8d363ec2481396b37ce1847c4bb" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { "ERROR STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; try { $s = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($s\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } catch { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://7107.api.greenapi.com/waInstance710722680672/getSettings/bc21ddad58544c1abd540be8d363ec2481396b37ce1847c4bb" -Method Get -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { $err = $_; try { $s = $err.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($s\); $body = $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } catch { $body = "\(no body\)" }; "STATUS: $\($err.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; "BODY: $body" })

PowerShell($ts = 1784532859; $utc = [DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeSeconds\($ts\); $il = [System.TimeZoneInfo]::FindSystemTimeZoneById\("Israel Standard Time"\); $local = [System.TimeZoneInfo]::ConvertTime\($utc, $il\); "UTC:    $\($utc.ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'\)\)"; "Israel: $\($local.ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'\)\)"; $now = [DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow; $diff = $utc - $now; "In: $\([math]::Round\($diff.TotalHours,1\)\) hours \($\([math]::Round\($diff.TotalDays,1\)\) days\)")
